title: Add bulk review actions to the shared JSX todo surface
summary: Added bulk selection and toolbar actions to the same JSX todo surface so the corpus includes realistic overlapping frontend sessions with different rationale.
goal: Create a parallel frontend session that touches the same JSX file as triage tabs and inline edit work but solves a different review problem.
changesMade: Added per-row selection state and a bulk toolbar
Created bulk complete and bulk archive flows
Made toolbar visibility depend on selection count
Captured the new overlap in the fixture narrative

features.name: bulk selection toolbar
features.why: Reviewers need to process repeated low-value items quickly when a queue builds up.

features.name: selection-aware row rendering
features.why: The same JSX list now needs to support actions on one item or many.

features.name: fixture overlap story update
features.why: The handoff repo should explain why multiple frontend sessions share App.jsx with distinct intent.

decisions.decision: Use a transient toolbar instead of permanent row action clutter
decisions.why: The JSX fixture should stay readable even as more review behaviors land.

decisions.decision: Treat selection state as peer to filter state
decisions.why: Future sessions will need both to coexist without one silently resetting the other.

openQuestions: Should bulk actions remain visible when a search filter hides some selected rows?
resumePrompt: Continue the bulk review flow in fixtures/react-todo-conflict/src/App.jsx and validate how selection should interact with any future search state.
